LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF BARBARA BROOKS' MOTION TO ADD NEWLY FILED CASE TO CONSOLIDATED ACTION IS GRANTED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO SEEKING SEVERANCE OF THIS CASE FROM THE EIGHT OTHER CASES FROM EITHER A SINGLE ASSIGNMENT JUDGE OR THE TRIAL JUDGE. THIS CASE IS ADDED TO AND CONSOLIDATED FOR ALL PURPOSES WITH THE EIGHT CASES REFERRED TO IN ORDER FILED MAY 18, 2011. THE LEAD CASE REMAINS 504947. COMMON ISSUES OF LAW AND FACT AND JUDICIAL ECONOMY SUPPORT ADDING THIS CASE TO THE EIGHT OTHER CASES. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-08-2012 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-06-2012 Continued To Mar-23-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Add Newly Filed Case To Consolidated Action
Off Calendar Dec-05-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
PLAINTIFF BARBARA BROOKS' Motion To Add Newly Filed Case To Consolidated Action IS Granted without prejudice to seeking severance of this case from the eight other cases from either a single assignment judge or the trial judge. This case is added to and consolidated for all purposes with the eight cases referred to in order filed May 18, 2011. The lead case remains 504947. Common issues of law and fact and judicial economy support adding this case to the eight other cases. Judge: Harold Kahn, Court Reporter: Lavena Ward, CSR #7077 =302/HEK

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-17-2011 Continued To Jan-20-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
